case_title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. LINDA WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF WALTER LIN IN SUPPORT OF CLERKS JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019) AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1693 MARKET STREET #411 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC SERVED APR-06-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LINDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $0.40 PER DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67480019) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
